string 2: Minerva must be inside—along with the knowledge you seek.

I have not been this fired up in quite some time... Come,
now. Onward we go.
Minerva!
Corona...mon?
Why are you in jail?! What has transpired here?!
You see—
Wait. What?!
That person with you...!
It's been quite a while.
I see you remember me.
You haven't changed a bit.
How long has it been?
We will have you out of there in—
This cell isn't so easily broken. Trust me. I've tried.

More importantly... I need you to convey a message to
Merukimon.
The one who locked me away here... was Junomon.
...What?
And that's not all.

At the time of the disturbance that happened in Shinjuku
eight years ago...

...several Digimon—including a few Titans—were captured by
humans.
Rumor has it... they were used in some awful experiments.

The Titans flew into a rage when they heard about it. They
even plotted to invade the human world.

Apparently, that's why they were planning to open the gate
of the temple.

I tried to report this to Junomon, but as soon as I started
talking... Junomon suddenly changed completely...

Hurry up and tell my story. There'll be plenty of time to
get me out of here afterward.
